SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2022 - CONTINUED THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-14-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIM ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT MARELICH MECHANICAL CO., INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL TREPPA, ESQ (ATTORNEY ON BEHALF OF MARELICH MECHANICAL CO. FOR PARENT COMPANY CALLED EM-CORE). DEFENDANT NORCAL RENTAL GROUP, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY AARON VEUVE, GM CREDIT AND RISK. SMALL CLAIMS CANNOT HAVE ATTORNEYS REPRESENT SMALL CLAIMANT. CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR MARELICH MECHANICAL CO. TO HAVE A NON-LAWYER TO REPRESENT THEIR BUSINESS AT THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT NORCAL RENTAL GROUP, LLC WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-05-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARELICH MECHANICAL CO., INC
ORDER CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-25-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, REPRESENTED BY TRICIA PEARSE-WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARELICH MECHANICAL CO., INC., IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NORCAL RENTAL GROUP LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
